programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Gambino crime family member Roy DeMeo leads a crew that murders and dismembers dozens of people.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld
programme.desc: Addicted gamblers from Taiwan to Singapore bet on anything and everything.

programme.title: Code Of Silence - Trail Of Murder
programme.desc: A documentary about the Boston Bandits gang in the 1990’s known for armored car and bank robberies.

programme.title: The Unsolved Killings Of Jack The Ripper
programme.desc: The 1888 Whitechapel murders by Jack the Ripper sparked fear and enduring mystery in East London.

programme.title: Aileen : Life and Death of a Serial killer
programme.desc: This documentary about serial killer Aileen Wuornos, focuses on her mental state when she was on death row.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: In 1967, Connie & Carolyn Hevener were murdered in a robbery; the killer remains free 4 years later.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: Donna Fowler vanishes, then Stacy Belcher; two families haunted by loss for over 20 years.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: In 1980, Marlene Major vanishes; her husband claims she ran, but the truth is far more sinister.

programme.title: The Lady Killers
programme.desc: Elderly man found murdered; loved in community, but family issues hint at hidden motives.

programme.title: The Lady Killers
programme.desc: Detectives uncover the story of murdered mother Saima Khan, and of her suspicious sister.

programme.title: The Lady Killers
programme.desc: Disabled man Christopher Donnelly dies; wife Hannah's abuse history sparks police probe.

programme.title: Love and Hate Crime
programme.desc: Transgender teenager Mercedes Williamson is murdered by her boyfriend.

programme.title: Love and Hate Crime
programme.desc: In Mississippi, a black man is murdered in a hate crime perpetrated by a group of white teenagers.

programme.title: Love and Hate Crime
programme.desc: A man breaks into the apartment of a married couple and opens fire while wearing a camera.

programme.title: Who Killed Tupac Shakur?
programme.desc: After Tyson's fight in Vegas, Tupac and Suge clashed with rival Orlando Anderson, sparking violence.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: Marilyn Kananen, 65, disappears. Her children suspect their abusive father, gone for 15 years, has returned. Detectives find evidence that turns the case upside down.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: Heather Church's skull found 2 years post-abduction; clues lead to a prolific U.S. serial killer.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: Nearly two decades later, cold case detectives use new technology to solve Lisa Summers' murder.

programme.title: The Lady Killers
programme.desc: Lavender Cheema's love triangle amid illness and jealousy reveals cultural pressures and tragic fallout.

programme.title: The Lady Killers
programme.desc: Love, jealousy, and deceit erupt in tragedy as hidden motives turn a quiet London suburb violent.

programme.title: The Lady Killers
programme.desc: Mahmood's bid for freedom from a painful marriage ends in murder, exposing rage, trauma, and repression.

programme.title: Great Crimes And Trials
programme.desc: 16 years after Martha Moxley's death in a exclusive New York suburb

programme.title: The Perfect Victim
programme.desc: Follow three women that spent time in prison, having each been convicted of killing their abusive husbands.

programme.title: The Boneyard
programme.desc: A group of zombie children caused chaos in a coroner's building, necessitating the intervention of a psychic

programme.title: Great Crimes And Trials
programme.desc: In 1996, Zachary Ramsay disappeared while on his way to school, leading police to suspect a known pedophile

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics aid in two cases: Daigle's pool hall vanishing and NJ teen's suspect-linked disappearance.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics aid NJ and New Orleans murder cases, revealing truths and clearing key suspects.
